requirement_topic.en: BSTI Certification Mark (CM) Licence — Pre-Import Mandatory Certification (Bangladesh)
requirement_topic.zh: BSTI认证标志（CM）许可——进口前强制认证（孟加拉国）
requirement_topic.zht: BSTI認證標誌（CM）許可——進口前強制認證（孟加拉）

summary.en: Household refrigerators on Bangladesh's compulsory-certification list require a BSTI Certification Mark (CM) licence before they may be lawfully imported and sold, under the BSTI Act, 2018. There is no single CE-equivalent multi-directive mark in Bangladesh; the BSTI CM mark is the principal product-certification gate and is assessed against the applicable Bangladesh Standard (BDS), which for refrigerators adopts IEC 60335-2-24 (safety) and references IEC 62552 (energy/performance test methods) alongside the SREDA star label. The CM-licence process typically involves: application to BSTI by the manufacturer or in-country importer; submission and testing of product samples at a BSTI or BSTI-recognised laboratory against the relevant BDS; factory/quality documentation review; and grant of a CM licence authorising use of the BSTI mark. The CM mark must be displayed on the product before market placement. For imported consignments, BSTI clearance/registration is generally required as part of import documentation at the port of entry (Chattogram or Mongla).
summary.zh: 列入孟加拉国强制认证清单的家用电冰箱在依据《2018年BSTI法》合法进口和销售前，须取得BSTI认证标志（CM）许可。孟加拉国没有单一等同于CE的多指令标志；BSTI CM标志为主要产品认证门槛，依据适用的孟加拉国标准（BDS）评定，电冰箱的BDS采用IEC 60335-2-24（安全）并参考IEC 62552（能效/性能试验方法），同时配合SREDA星级标识。CM许可流程通常包括：由制造商或本地进口商向BSTI申请；在BSTI或BSTI认可实验室依据相应BDS提交并检测产品样品；工厂/质量文件审查；以及授予CM许可，准许使用BSTI标志。CM标志须在投放市场前展示于产品上。对于进口货物，BSTI放行/登记一般作为入境口岸（吉大港或蒙格拉港）进口单证的一部分。
summary.zht: 列入孟加拉強制認證清單的家用電冰箱在依據《2018年BSTI法》合法進口和銷售前，須取得BSTI認證標誌（CM）許可。孟加拉沒有單一等同於CE的多指令標誌；BSTI CM標誌為主要產品認證門檻，依據適用的孟加拉標準（BDS）評定，電冰箱的BDS採用IEC 60335-2-24（安全）並參考IEC 62552（能效/性能試驗方法），同時配合SREDA星級標識。CM許可流程通常包括：由製造商或本地進口商向BSTI申請；在BSTI或BSTI認可實驗室依據相應BDS提交並檢測產品樣品；工廠/品質文件審查；以及授予CM許可，准許使用BSTI標誌。CM標誌須在投放市場前展示於產品上。對於進口貨物，BSTI放行/登記一般作為入境口岸（吉大港或蒙格拉港）進口單證的一部分。

standards_or_laws: BSTI Act, 2018 — legal basis for the BSTI Certification Mark (CM) scheme and compulsory-certification list
BDS IEC 60335-2-24 — safety standard against which refrigerators are assessed for the CM licence
BDS adoption of IEC 62552 series — energy/performance test methods referenced for the appliance
BSTI import clearance/registration — required for certified products at the port of entry (Chattogram / Mongla)

summary.en: In China, household refrigerators require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale, plus the separate China Energy Label (based on GB 12021.2). CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies; it is the structural analogue of a mandatory product mark but is China-specific. There is no single CE-equivalent mark in China either — CCC covers safety/EMC and the China Energy Label covers energy. A Chinese CCC certificate is recognised only within China and is not accepted by BSTI as the basis for a CM licence; the BSTI CM scheme is a wholly separate certification with its own application, testing and marking requirements.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用电冰箱在销售前须取得中国强制认证（CCC），涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1），并另需中国能效标识（基于GB 12021.2）。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构审核；其为强制性产品标志的结构性对应，但仅适用于中国。中国同样没有单一等同于CE的标志——CCC涵盖安全/电磁兼容，中国能效标识涵盖能效。中国CCC证书仅在中国境内被认可，不被BSTI接受为CM许可的依据；BSTI CM制度是完全独立的认证，具有自身的申请、检测和标识要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用電冰箱在銷售前須取得中國強制認證（CCC），涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1），並另需中國能效標識（基於GB 12021.2）。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構審核；其為強制性產品標誌的結構性對應，但僅適用於中國。中國同樣沒有單一等同於CE的標誌——CCC涵蓋安全/電磁相容，中國能效標識涵蓋能效。中國CCC證書僅在中國境內被認可，不被BSTI接受為CM許可的依據；BSTI CM制度是完全獨立的認證，具有自身的申請、檢測和標識要求。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must obtain a BSTI CM licence from scratch — CCC and the China Energy Label do not substitute: (1) CM application and testing — apply to BSTI (usually via the in-country importer) and have product samples tested at a BSTI or BSTI-recognised laboratory against BDS IEC 60335-2-24; CCC certificates/CNAS reports are not accepted in lieu, though a BSTI-acceptable IECEE CB Scheme report may reduce re-testing at BSTI's discretion. (2) SREDA star label — separately obtain the SREDA energy star rating where mandatory (see energy rows). (3) Marking — apply the BSTI CM mark and 220 V / 50 Hz-appropriate rating plate. (4) Import documentation — BSTI clearance/registration is part of the import process at Chattogram/Mongla, alongside the standard import permit and Letter of Credit chain handled through the in-country importer (see frigbd-market-002). Confirm the current compulsory-certification list scope for refrigerators, as BSTI's mandatory list is periodically updated.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须从头取得BSTI CM许可——CCC和中国能效标识均不能替代：（1）CM申请与检测——向BSTI（通常经本地进口商）申请，并在BSTI或BSTI认可实验室依据BDS IEC 60335-2-24检测产品样品；CCC证书/CNAS报告不被接受替代，但BSTI可接受的IECEE CB体系报告或可酌情缩减BSTI重新检测范围。（2）SREDA星级标识——在强制时另行取得SREDA能效星级（见能效行）。（3）标识——加贴BSTI CM标志及适配220 V/50 Hz的铭牌。（4）进口单证——BSTI放行/登记是吉大港/蒙格拉港进口流程的一部分，并配合经本地进口商处理的标准进口许可与信用证链条（见frigbd-market-002）。须确认当前对电冰箱的强制认证清单范围，因BSTI强制清单会定期更新。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須從頭取得BSTI CM許可——CCC和中國能效標識均不能替代：（1）CM申請與檢測——向BSTI（通常經本地進口商）申請，並在BSTI或BSTI認可實驗室依據BDS IEC 60335-2-24檢測產品樣品；CCC證書/CNAS報告不被接受替代，但BSTI可接受的IECEE CB體系報告或可酌情縮減BSTI重新檢測範圍。（2）SREDA星級標識——在強制時另行取得SREDA能效星級（見能效行）。（3）標識——加貼BSTI CM標誌及適配220 V/50 Hz的銘牌。（4）進口單證——BSTI放行/登記是吉大港/蒙格拉港進口流程的一部分，並配合經本地進口商處理的標準進口許可與信用證鏈條（見frigbd-market-002）。須確認當前對電冰箱的強制認證清單範圍，因BSTI強制清單會定期更新。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a BSTI Certification Mark (CM) licence is required before import and sale for refrigerators on the compulsory-certification list; assessed against BDS IEC 60335-2-24 under the BSTI Act, 2018
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A BSTI Certification Mark (CM) licence is the mandatory product-certification gate for refrigerators entering Bangladesh, assessed against BDS IEC 60335-2-24 with the SREDA star label handled separately. Chinese CCC and the China Energy Label do not substitute — the manufacturer/importer must apply to BSTI, test samples, and display the CM mark. An IECEE CB Scheme report may reduce re-testing at BSTI's discretion. Confirm the current compulsory-list scope for refrigerators.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] BSTI认证标志（CM）许可是电冰箱进入孟加拉国的强制性产品认证门槛，依据BDS IEC 60335-2-24评定，SREDA星级标识另行处理。中国CCC和中国能效标识不能替代——制造商/进口商须向BSTI申请、检测样品并展示CM标志。IECEE CB体系报告或可经BSTI酌情缩减重新检测。请确认当前对电冰箱的强制清单范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] BSTI認證標誌（CM）許可是電冰箱進入孟加拉的強制性產品認證門檻，依據BDS IEC 60335-2-24評定，SREDA星級標識另行處理。中國CCC和中國能效標識不能替代——製造商/進口商須向BSTI申請、檢測樣品並展示CM標誌。IECEE CB體系報告或可經BSTI酌情縮減重新檢測。請確認當前對電冰箱的強制清單範圍。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer, Import Permit and Letter of Credit Chain (Bangladesh)
requirement_topic.zh: 本地进口商、进口许可及信用证链条（孟加拉国）
requirement_topic.zht: 本地進口商、進口許可及信用證鏈條（孟加拉）

summary.en: Goods imported into Bangladesh must move through a registered in-country importer holding a valid Import Registration Certificate (IRC) issued by the Office of the Chief Controller of Imports and Exports (CCI&E), and the import is processed under the Import Policy Order and the Customs Act. Commercial imports of refrigerators are typically settled by a Letter of Credit (L/C) opened by the Bangladeshi importer through an authorised dealer bank, with the L/C and import documentation (commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading, certificate of origin, and the BSTI clearance/CM evidence) presented for customs clearance at the port of entry — principally Chattogram (Chittagong) seaport or Mongla seaport. There is no mechanism for a foreign manufacturer to place product on the Bangladesh market without a Bangladesh-established importer/economic operator: the importer is the responsible party for customs, BSTI compliance evidence, and any subsequent market issues. Applicable customs duty, VAT, supplementary duty and other levies are assessed at import.
summary.zh: 进口至孟加拉国的货物须经持有进出口管制总署（CCI&E）签发的有效进口注册证（IRC）的注册本地进口商办理，进口依据《进口政策令》及《海关法》处理。电冰箱的商业进口通常由孟加拉国进口商通过授权交易商银行开立信用证（L/C）结算，并凭信用证及进口单证（商业发票、装箱单、提单、原产地证及BSTI放行/CM证明）在入境口岸办理清关——主要为吉大港（Chittagong）海港或蒙格拉港海港。外国制造商无机制在没有孟加拉国设立进口商/经济运营商的情况下将产品投放孟加拉国市场：进口商为海关、BSTI合规证明及后续市场问题的责任方。适用的关税、增值税、补充税及其他税费在进口时核定。
summary.zht: 進口至孟加拉的貨物須經持有進出口管制總署（CCI&E）簽發的有效進口註冊證（IRC）的註冊本地進口商辦理，進口依據《進口政策令》及《海關法》處理。電冰箱的商業進口通常由孟加拉進口商通過授權交易商銀行開立信用證（L/C）結算，並憑信用證及進口單證（商業發票、裝箱單、提單、原產地證及BSTI放行/CM證明）在入境口岸辦理清關——主要為吉大港（Chittagong）海港或蒙格拉港海港。外國製造商無機制在沒有孟加拉設立進口商/經濟運營商的情況下將產品投放孟加拉市場：進口商為海關、BSTI合規證明及後續市場問題的責任方。適用的關稅、增值稅、補充稅及其他稅費在進口時核定。

standards_or_laws: Import Policy Order (Ministry of Commerce) — framework for imports into Bangladesh
Import Registration Certificate (IRC) — issued by the Office of the Chief Controller of Imports and Exports (CCI&E); required for the in-country importer
Customs Act and customs procedures — clearance at Chattogram (Chittagong) and Mongla seaports; duty/VAT/supplementary duty assessment
Letter of Credit (L/C) via an authorised dealer bank — standard settlement and import-documentation route

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent requiring an export manufacturer to designate a foreign-country resident responsible economic operator for product compliance and market surveillance. Chinese export manufacturers appoint overseas distributors/importers on a commercial basis. On the export side, Chinese exporters operate through their own export/customs registration and typically transact via L/C or other agreed terms; but the obligation to hold a Bangladesh IRC, open the L/C, and serve as the responsible party for BSTI compliance and customs falls on the Bangladeshi importer, not the Chinese manufacturer. Under the CCC domestic regime the certificate holder is responsible only for domestic-market compliance — this role does not extend to or satisfy Bangladesh import/market-access requirements.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，要求出口制造商指定一名在目的国境内居住、负责产品合规及市场监管的责任经济运营商。中国出口制造商以商业形式委任海外经销商/进口商。在出口端，中国出口商通过自身的出口/海关登记运营，通常以信用证或其他约定条件交易；但持有孟加拉国IRC、开立信用证并作为BSTI合规及海关责任方的义务落在孟加拉国进口商身上，而非中国制造商。在CCC国内制度下，证书持有人仅对国内市场合规负责——该角色不延伸至孟加拉国进口/市场准入要求，亦不能满足后者。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，要求出口製造商指定一名在目的國境內居住、負責產品合規及市場監管的責任經濟運營商。中國出口製造商以商業形式委任海外經銷商/進口商。在出口端，中國出口商通過自身的出口/海關登記運營，通常以信用證或其他約定條件交易；但持有孟加拉IRC、開立信用證並作為BSTI合規及海關責任方的義務落在孟加拉進口商身上，而非中國製造商。在CCC國內制度下，證書持有人僅對國內市場合規負責——該角色不延伸至孟加拉進口/市場准入要求，亦不能滿足後者。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent obliging an exporter to appoint a Bangladesh responsible importer/economic operator

gap.en: This is a structural market-access gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue. A Chinese refrigerator manufacturer cannot place product on the Bangladesh market directly: (1) In-country importer — a Bangladesh-established importer holding a valid IRC must import the goods and act as the responsible party for customs and BSTI compliance evidence. (2) L/C and documentation — the importer opens an L/C through an authorised dealer bank and presents the full import-documentation set (invoice, packing list, bill of lading, certificate of origin, BSTI CM/clearance evidence) for clearance at Chattogram or Mongla. (3) Duties/taxes — customs duty, VAT and supplementary duty are assessed at import and must be factored into landed cost. (4) Coordination — the manufacturer must coordinate with the importer so that BSTI CM licensing and the SREDA star label are in place before the consignment arrives, otherwise the goods may be held at port. Unlike the EU's mandated Authorised Representative, Bangladesh routes responsibility through the commercial importer rather than a separately appointed compliance representative.
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性市场准入差距。中国电冰箱制造商不能直接将产品投放孟加拉国市场：（1）本地进口商——须由持有有效IRC的孟加拉国设立进口商进口货物，并作为海关及BSTI合规证明的责任方。（2）信用证与单证——进口商通过授权交易商银行开立信用证，并提交完整进口单证（发票、装箱单、提单、原产地证、BSTI CM/放行证明）在吉大港或蒙格拉港清关。（3）税费——关税、增值税及补充税在进口时核定，须计入到岸成本。（4）协调——制造商须与进口商协调，确保在货物抵达前BSTI CM许可及SREDA星级标识已就位，否则货物可能在港口被扣留。与欧盟强制的授权代表不同，孟加拉国通过商业进口商而非单独委任的合规代表传导责任。
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性市場准入差距。中國電冰箱製造商不能直接將產品投放孟加拉市場：（1）本地進口商——須由持有有效IRC的孟加拉設立進口商進口貨物，並作為海關及BSTI合規證明的責任方。（2）信用證與單證——進口商通過授權交易商銀行開立信用證，並提交完整進口單證（發票、裝箱單、提單、原產地證、BSTI CM/放行證明）在吉大港或蒙格拉港清關。（3）稅費——關稅、增值稅及補充稅在進口時核定，須計入到岸成本。（4）協調——製造商須與進口商協調，確保在貨物抵達前BSTI CM許可及SREDA星級標識已就位，否則貨物可能在港口被扣留。與歐盟強制的授權代表不同，孟加拉通過商業進口商而非單獨委任的合規代表傳導責任。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — import via a Bangladesh-registered importer holding a valid IRC, with L/C and full import documentation, is required; customs clearance and BSTI compliance evidence at Chattogram/Mongla are conditions of entry
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation under Chinese law to appoint a Bangladesh responsible importer/economic operator

source.publisher: Office of the Chief Controller of Imports and Exports (CCI&E), Ministry of Commerce, Bangladesh

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese refrigerator manufacturers must sell into Bangladesh through a Bangladesh-registered importer holding a valid IRC, with the L/C and full import-documentation chain (including BSTI CM/clearance evidence) handled by that importer for customs clearance at Chattogram or Mongla. Duties, VAT and supplementary duty apply at import. Unlike the EU Authorised Representative, responsibility runs through the commercial importer; the manufacturer must coordinate so BSTI and SREDA requirements are met before the consignment arrives.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电冰箱制造商须通过持有有效IRC的孟加拉国注册进口商向孟加拉国销售，由该进口商处理信用证及完整进口单证链条（含BSTI CM/放行证明），在吉大港或蒙格拉港清关。进口时适用关税、增值税及补充税。与欧盟授权代表不同，责任通过商业进口商传导；制造商须协调以确保在货物抵达前满足BSTI及SREDA要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電冰箱製造商須通過持有有效IRC的孟加拉註冊進口商向孟加拉銷售，由該進口商處理信用證及完整進口單證鏈條（含BSTI CM/放行證明），在吉大港或蒙格拉港清關。進口時適用關稅、增值稅及補充稅。與歐盟授權代表不同，責任通過商業進口商傳導；製造商須協調以確保在貨物抵達前滿足BSTI及SREDA要求。
